title: clutia tomentosa var. genuina
intro: Clutia tomentosa var. genuina is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the rough clutia. It is a shrub native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Clutia tomentosa var. genuina is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as infusions, ointments, and poultices to harness its medicinal benefits.
